    Initializes the entity's hitbox.

    Checks if an entity is standing on the floor.

    Checks if there is a solid tile below the entity when moving horizontally.

    Checks if the mouse event is within the bounds of the provided menu button.

    IsSightClear(int[][], Rectangle2D.Float, Rectangle2D.Float, int) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Checks if the line of sight between two hitboxes is clear.
    IsSolid(float, float, int[][]) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Checks if a specified position is solid (collision occurs) in the level's data.
    IsTileSolid(int, int, int[][]) - Static method in class utilz.HelpMethods
    Determines if a tile at the specified coordinates is solid.
